videos.title: Bitcoin Analysis: Whale Buying, Long Term Outlook, And Weekly Levels
videos.description: Whales bought 270,000 Bitcoin in 30 days. That is 20 billion dollars and the largest monthly accumulation since 2013. BlackRock's IBIT holds over 800,000 BTC. Strategy added another billion last week.
